paper.title: Evaluating permanent deformation in asphalt rubber mixtures
paper.authors: Liseane P.T.L. Fontes; Glicério Trichês; Jorge C. Pais; Paulo A.A. Pereira
paper.notes: Reports rutting/permanent deformation of asphalt mixtures, not cementitious compressive strength.

evidence.evidence_text: Title and abstract identify asphalt rubber mixtures and rutting/permanent deformation tests.

main_risks: No directly extractable cementitious mix-level compressive-strength data in supplied packet.
